sharc
Documentation développeur
RegularGrid.cc
1 #include "RegularGrid.h"
2 
3 #include <arcane/utils/Array2.h>
4 #include <arcane/utils/FatalErrorException.h>
5 
6 #include <boost/range/algorithm.hpp>
7 #include <arcane/ItemTypes.h>
8 #include <arcane/ItemGroup.h>
9 #include <arcane/ItemEnumerator.h>
10 #include <set>
11 
12 Integer const RegularGrid::m_default_nb_elts_per_cell = 6;
13 Real const RegularGrid::m_default_epsilon = 1e-6;
14 Real const RegularGrid::m_default_threshold_augmentation = 0.02;
15 
16 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
29 RegularGrid::RegularGrid(MeshCellAccessor* acc,
30  Integer nx,
31  Integer ny,
32  Integer nz,
33  IBoundingBox& box,
34  Integer nb_elts_per_cell,
35  Real epsilon,
36  Real threshold_augmentation)
37  : m_epsilon(epsilon)
38  , m_threshold_augmentation(threshold_augmentation)
39  , m_nb_elts_per_cell(nb_elts_per_cell)
40 {
41  m_mesh_cell_acc = acc;
42 
43  // Retrieves the bounding box of the geometry and the increased bounding box
44  initBoxes(box);
45 
46  // Computes the different length parameters of the grid (deltaX, xmin, xmax ...)
47  initCellsSize(nx, ny, nz, RegularGrid::BASIC, m_increased_box);
48 
49  // Computes the number of cells in the grid
50  m_nb_of_cells = m_nb_x * m_nb_y * m_nb_z;
51 
52  m_loaded = false;
53 }
54 
64 RegularGrid::RegularGrid(MeshCellAccessor* acc,
65  GridType gt,
66  IBoundingBox& box,
67  Integer nb_elts_per_cell,
68  Real epsilon,
69  Real threshold_augmentation)
70 : m_epsilon(epsilon)
71 , m_threshold_augmentation(threshold_augmentation)
72 
73 {
74  m_mesh_cell_acc = acc;
75 
76  // Specify the number of elements per cell
77  if (nb_elts_per_cell > 0)
78  {
79  m_nb_elts_per_cell = nb_elts_per_cell;
80  }
81 
82  // Retrieve the bounding box of the geometry and the increased bounding box
83  initBoxes(box);
84  // If the user call this method to create a basic grid without specifying the number of
85  // cells, a default anisotropic grid will be create
86  if (gt == RegularGrid::BASIC)
87  {
88  throw FatalErrorException(String::format("RegularGrid::BASIC - GridType not implemented."));
89  }
90  else
91  {
92  // Compute the different length parameters of the grid (deltaX, xmin, xmax ...)
93  initCellsSize(0, 0, 0, gt, m_increased_box);
94  }
95 
96  // Computes the number of cells in the grid
97  m_nb_of_cells = m_nb_x * m_nb_y * m_nb_z;
98 
99  m_loaded = false;
100 }
101 
108 void RegularGrid::initBoxes(IBoundingBox& box)
109 {
110  m_b_box.set(box);
111  m_increased_box.set(box);
112  m_increased_box.increaseBBox(m_threshold_augmentation, m_epsilon);
113 }
114 
124 void RegularGrid::initCellsSize(int nx, int ny, int nz, GridType gt, const OrthonormalBoundingBox& box)
125 {
126 
127  switch (gt)
128  {
129  case ANISOTROPE:
130  throw FatalErrorException("RegularGrid::initCellsSize - GridType ANISOTROPE not implemented.");
131  break;
132  case ANISOTROPE_Z_1:
133  throw FatalErrorException("RegularGrid::initCellsSize - GridType ANISOTROPE_Z_1 not implemented.");
134  break;
135  case ISOTROPE:
136  initCellsSizeIsotrope();
137  break;
138  case BASIC:
139  initCellsSizeBasic(nx, ny, nz, box);
140  break;
141  }
142 }
143 
147 void RegularGrid::initCellsSizeIsotrope()
148 {
149  // Isotropic case, first we compute the common interval between each cell (same on the
150  // X, Y and Z axis)
151  Real delta = computeDimensionsIsoGrid();
152  // Second, we compute the other parameters
153  computeCellsSizeIso(delta);
154 }
155 
164 void RegularGrid::initCellsSizeBasic(int nx, int ny, int nz,const OrthonormalBoundingBox& box)
165 {
166  m_nb_x = nx;
167  m_nb_y = ny;
168  m_nb_z = nz;
169 
170  // Made to avoid accuracy issues
171  m_b_box.setXMax(box.getXMax() + m_epsilon);
172  m_b_box.setYMax(box.getYMax() + m_epsilon);
173  m_b_box.setZMax(box.getZMax() + m_epsilon);
174 
175  m_b_box.setXMin(box.getXMin() - m_epsilon);
176  m_b_box.setYMin(box.getYMin() - m_epsilon);
177  m_b_box.setZMin(box.getZMin() - m_epsilon);
178 
179  computeDelta();
180 
181  setCoordinateLimits();
182 }
183 
188 Real RegularGrid::computeDimensionsIsoGrid()
189 {
191  Integer nb_of_elements = m_mesh_cell_acc->nbElements();
192 
193  // Compute the grid threshold (number of elements per cell)
194  Integer M = computeThreshold(nb_of_elements);
195 
196  Real x = m_b_box.getXMax() - m_b_box.getXMin();
197  Real y = m_b_box.getYMax() - m_b_box.getYMin();
198  Real z = m_b_box.getZMax() - m_b_box.getZMin();
199 
200  RealSharedArray tmp;
201  tmp.resize(3);
202  tmp[0] = x;
203  tmp[1] = y;
204  tmp[2] = z;
205  boost::sort(tmp);
206 
207  Real a = tmp[0], b = tmp[1], c = tmp[2];
208 
209  if (a * a * M < b * c)
210  {
211  a = math::sqrt((b * c) / M);
212 
213  if (b * b * M < a * c)
214  {
215  a = c / M;
216  }
217  }
218 
219  x = math::max(x, a);
220  y = math::max(y, a);
221  z = math::max(z, a);
222 
223  Real d = math::pow(M / (x * y * z), 1. / 3.);
224 
225  Real di = x * d;
226  Real dj = y * d;
227  Real dk = z * d;
228 
229  m_nb_x = clamp(1, M, (Integer) di);
230  m_nb_y = clamp(1, M, (Integer) dj);
231  m_nb_z = clamp(1, M, (Integer) dk);
232 
233  Real delta = math::max(x / m_nb_x, math::max(y / m_nb_y, z / m_nb_z));
234 
235  return delta;
236 }
237 
247 Integer RegularGrid::clamp(Integer min, Integer max, Integer val)
248 {
249  return math::min(math::max(val, min), max);
250 }
251 
257 void RegularGrid::computeCellsSizeIso(Real delta)
258 {
259 
260  // Compute the center of the geometry
261  Real midX = m_b_box.getXMax() + m_b_box.getXMin();
262  Real midY = m_b_box.getYMax() + m_b_box.getYMin();
263  Real midZ = m_b_box.getZMax() + m_b_box.getZMin();
264 
265  Real3 center(midX, midY, midZ);
266 
267  center *= 0.5;
268 
269  Real3 min;
270  Real3 max;
271  Real3 diag(m_nb_x * delta, m_nb_y * delta, m_nb_z * delta);
272  diag *= 0.5;
273 
274  // Compute the bounding box of the grid
275  {
276  min.assign(center);
277  max.assign(center);
278 
279  min.sub(diag);
280  max.add(diag);
281 
282  m_b_box.reset();
283 
284  m_b_box.addPoint(min);
285  m_b_box.addPoint(max);
286  }
287 
288  {
289  Real3 epsilon(m_epsilon, m_epsilon, m_epsilon);
290 
291  min.assign(center);
292  max.assign(center);
293 
294  min.sub(diag);
295  max.add(diag);
296 
297  min.add(epsilon);
298  max.sub(epsilon);
299 
300  m_increased_box.reset();
301 
302  m_increased_box.addPoint(min);
303  m_increased_box.addPoint(max);
304 
305  }
306 
307  computeDelta();
308 
309  setCoordinateLimits();
310 }
311 
318 void RegularGrid::getIJK(const Real3& P, ArrayView<Integer> tab) const
319 {
320  Integer i = (Integer) ((P.x - m_x_min) * m_inv_delta_x);
321  Integer j = (Integer) ((P.y - m_y_min) * m_inv_delta_y);
322  Integer k = (Integer) ((P.z - m_z_min) * m_inv_delta_z);
323  tab[0] = math::min(m_nb_x-1,math::max(0,i)) ;
324  tab[1] = math::min(m_nb_y-1,math::max(0,j)) ;
325  tab[2] = math::min(m_nb_z-1,math::max(0,k)) ;
326 }
327 
337 Integer RegularGrid::getIJK(Integer i, Integer j, Integer k) const
338 {
339  if (i < 0 || i >= m_nb_x)
340  {
341  throw FatalErrorException(String::format("RegularGrid - I out of range: {0} (max: {1})", i, m_nb_x - 1));
342  }
343 
344  if (j < 0 || j >= m_nb_y)
345  {
346  throw FatalErrorException(String::format("RegularGrid - J out of range: {0} (max: {1})", j, m_nb_y - 1));
347  }
348 
349  if (k < 0 || k >= m_nb_z)
350  {
351  throw FatalErrorException(String::format("RegularGrid - K out of range: {0} (max: {1})", k, m_nb_z - 1));
352  }
353 
354  return (k * m_nb_y + j) * m_nb_x + i;
355 }
356 
364 void RegularGrid::getElementsFromCell(Integer i, UniqueArray<Integer>& it) const
365 {
366  it.clear();
367  std::map<Integer, IntegerSharedArray>::const_iterator cell_to_elt = m_cell_to_elt_map.find(i);
368  if (cell_to_elt != m_cell_to_elt_map.end())
369  {
370  it.addRange(cell_to_elt->second);
371  }
372 }
373 void RegularGrid::getCellIndexesFromBox(const Real3& minCorner,
374  const Real3& maxCorner,
375  UniqueArray<Integer>& indexes) const
376 {
377  UniqueArray<Integer> minIJK(3) ;
378  UniqueArray<Integer> maxIJK(3) ;
379  getIJK(minCorner,minIJK) ;
380  getIJK(maxCorner,maxIJK) ;
381  Integer ni = maxIJK[0]-minIJK[0]+1 ;
382  Integer nj = maxIJK[1]-minIJK[1]+1 ;
383  Integer nk = maxIJK[2]-minIJK[2]+1 ;
384  Integer nb_cells = ni*nj*nk;
385  indexes.clear() ;
386  indexes.reserve(nb_cells) ;
387  for(Integer k=minIJK[2];k<maxIJK[2]+1;++k)
388  for(Integer j=minIJK[1];j<maxIJK[1]+1;++j)
389  for(Integer i=minIJK[0];i<maxIJK[0]+1;++i)
390  indexes.add(getIJK(i,j,k)) ;
391 }
392 
393 void
394 RegularGrid::getElementsFromCellIndexes(ConstArrayView<Integer> indexes,UniqueArray<Integer>& lids) const
395 {
396  // WARNING AN ELEMENT CAN BELONGS TO SEVERAL CELLS : NEED TO CHECK THAT THEY ARE ALREADY INSERTED
397  std::set<Integer> lid_set ;
398  for(Integer i=0;i<indexes.size();++i)
399  {
400  std::map<Integer, IntegerSharedArray>::const_iterator cell_to_elt = m_cell_to_elt_map.find(indexes[i]);
401  if (cell_to_elt != m_cell_to_elt_map.end())
402  {
403  for( auto lid : cell_to_elt->second )
404  lid_set.insert(lid) ;
405  }
406  }
407  for(auto lid : lid_set )
408  lids.add(lid) ;
409 }
410 
415 void RegularGrid::insertAll(IMesh* mesh)
416 {
417  Integer index = 0;
418  // Min boundary of the element bounding boxes
419  Real3 MinBound;
420  // Max boundary of the element bounding boxes
421  Real3 MaxBound;
422  // Temporary array used to store cell coordinates
423  UniqueArray<Integer> tab(3);
424 
426  Integer nb_of_elements = m_mesh_cell_acc->nbElements();
427 
428  // Matrix storing the coordinates of the left front lower cell and the right bottom top cell
429  IntegerSharedArray2 bbox_coords(6, nb_of_elements);
430 
431  // MultiMap linking elements and cells, core of the grid
432 // cellToEltMap = new SoftMultiMap();
433 
434  // Temporary bounding box used to store the bbox of the mesh elements
435  OrthonormalBoundingBox tempEltBox;
436 
437  // For an element, find the cells crossing its bounding box, storing the two extreme ones,
438  // and increasing the number of element per cell
439  m_cell_to_elt_map.clear();
440  ENUMERATE_CELL(icell,mesh->allActiveCells())
441  //for (int nb_elt = 0; nb_elt < nb_of_elements; nb_elt++)
442  {
443  Cell cell=*icell;
444  const Int32 cell_lid= cell.localId();
445 
446  // Reset the temporary bounding box
447  tempEltBox.reset();
448  // Get the bounding box of the current element
449  // ****THIS IS THE HEAVY COMPUTATION OF THE REGULAR GRID****
450  m_mesh_cell_acc->getCellBoundingBox(cell_lid, tempEltBox);
451 
452  //TODO PAS BESOIN?
453 // if (!check(tempEltBox))
454 // {
455 // continue;
456 // }
457 
458  // Increase this bounding box to avoid accuracy issues
459  tempEltBox.increaseBBox(0.01, m_epsilon);
460  // Get the min and max boundaries of the bbox
461  MinBound.assign(tempEltBox.getXMin(), tempEltBox.getYMin(), tempEltBox.getZMin());
462  MaxBound.assign(tempEltBox.getXMax(), tempEltBox.getYMax(), tempEltBox.getZMax());
463  // Find the cells around the element bounding box
464  getIJK(MinBound, tab);
465  bbox_coords[0][cell_lid] = math::max(tab[0], 0);
466  bbox_coords[1][cell_lid] = math::max(tab[1], 0);
467  bbox_coords[2][cell_lid] = math::max(tab[2], 0);
468  getIJK(MaxBound, tab);
469  bbox_coords[3][cell_lid] = math::min(tab[0] + 1, getNbX());
470  bbox_coords[4][cell_lid] = math::min(tab[1] + 1, getNbY());
471  bbox_coords[5][cell_lid] = math::min(tab[2] + 1, getNbZ());
472  // For each cell containing the element, we increase the number of elements found inside
473  // this cell and we increase the general element per cell counter
474  for (Integer i = bbox_coords[0][cell_lid]; i < bbox_coords[3][cell_lid]; i++)
475  {
476  for (Integer j = bbox_coords[1][cell_lid]; j < bbox_coords[4][cell_lid]; j++)
477  {
478  for (Integer k = bbox_coords[2][cell_lid]; k < bbox_coords[5][cell_lid]; k++)
479  {
480  index = getIJK(i, j, k);
481  m_cell_to_elt_map[index].add(cell_lid);
482  }
483  }
484  }
485  }
486 
487  // Specify that the grid has been filled
488  m_loaded = true;
489 }
490 
498 Integer RegularGrid::computeThreshold(Integer n)
499 {
500 
501  n /= m_nb_elts_per_cell;
502  if (n == 0)
503  {
504  n = 5;
505  }
506  return n;
507 }
508 
509 void RegularGrid::setCoordinateLimits()
510 {
511 // Compute the coordinate limits of the grid
512  m_x_min = m_b_box.getXMin();
513  m_y_min = m_b_box.getYMin();
514  m_z_min = m_b_box.getZMin();
515 
516  m_x_max = m_b_box.getXMax();
517  m_y_max = m_b_box.getYMax();
518  m_z_max = m_b_box.getZMax();
519 }
520 
521 void RegularGrid::computeDelta()
522 {
523  // Compute delta and its invert on each axis
524  m_delta_x = (m_b_box.getXMax() - m_b_box.getXMin()) / m_nb_x;
525  m_delta_y = (m_b_box.getYMax() - m_b_box.getYMin()) / m_nb_y;
526  m_delta_z = (m_b_box.getZMax() - m_b_box.getZMin()) / m_nb_z;
527 
528  if (m_delta_x < 1e-5)
529  {
530  m_inv_delta_x = 0.;
531  }
532  else
533  {
534  m_inv_delta_x = 1.0 / m_delta_x;
535  }
536  if (m_delta_y < 1e-5)
537  {
538  m_inv_delta_y = 0.;
539  }
540  else
541  {
542  m_inv_delta_y = 1.0 / m_delta_y;
543  }
544  if (m_delta_z < 1e-5)
545  {
546  m_inv_delta_y = 0.;
547  }
548  else
549  {
550  m_inv_delta_z = 1.0 / m_delta_z;
551  }
552 
553 }
